creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #6)

@Kubilay Yes, comms/gnuradio expects ${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/ephem/__init__.py to be installed, but astro/pyephem (the actual version with the stub in the ports tree) does not install it any more. Because of that comms/gnuradio is not buildable atm.
